3256570.name: Mini Mini Golf Golf Demo
3256570.description:
The Demo for Mini Mini Golf Golf is a prelude to the full game - as a key character discovers the turbulence that turns a nostalgic round of minigolf into a scifi story about life, love and climate change. As you discover tunnels through spacetime and unravel memories of inevitable climate collapse, identity and responsibility collide at the fault line of our planet’s future.

The metaphor of a childhood memory – a perfectly normal round of minigolf – rips open the fabric of spacetime and connects you with a mysterious and bizarre entity from the future, injecting thoughts and ideas into your trails as you navigate a virtual underworld of memories to come.

Find out how nostalgic resonances can create tunnels through spacetime, what minigolf and carving parts of a tectonic fault line have in common, and what's it like to converse with a future once-human mind.

The Mini Mini Golf Golf Demo is…

  • A unique blend of mystery, sci-fi and experimental storytelling

  • An intriguing connection with a future queer entity

  • A prelude to the full game
3256570.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
